title: Steve Fans
description: Vanilla+ with some immersive additions for survival multiplayer. Highly customizable for people with any kind of system. Built for the Steve Fans server.
body:
## Survival Multiplayer Modpack with Vanilla+ in mind.
![SteveFansLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5116357e5e6e6df7ef66db7d55325d1739365f89.jpeg)

This modpack is truly VANILLA+. There are many modpacks out there that state they are vanilla plus, but this truly does not change the vanilla experience. If every mod from this pack was added to the vanilla game it would fit in.

Meant for a small group of friends. No major changes are made to the game. Some mods are required on the server for the client to work.


_There are a lot of configurable settings, if you have poor performance there should be options to solve that thanks to mods like Sodium._



_All credit goes to the mod developers._
